package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_pprof_endpoint_enabled_without_sampling_plan: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag always-on profiling endpoints in production services without access or sampling controls.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule578NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario578Negative(records []Rule578NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
